title: Deflection tower
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
{{Quote|There's a lot of fire coming from the right side of that deflection tower.|[[Garven Dreis]] during [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]|<ref name="Episode 4">{{Film|IV}}</ref>}}
[[File:Deflection-tower.jpg|thumb|250px|A deflection tower on the Death Star I, 0 BBY]]
A '''deflection tower''' was a shield generator found on large space stations and planets. On the first [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station|Death Star]], they helped generate a large deflection shield around the battle station, only allowing one-man starfighters to enter. Deflection towers were a primary target for [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)|Red Squadron]] during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] before attempting their bombing run on the [[Thermal exhaust port|exhaust port]].<ref name="anh">{{Film|IV}}</ref> The towers also served as power terminals.<ref name="anhn">[[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'' novelization]]</ref>

==Characteristics==
Deflection towers were mainly seen being used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], in place of the [[ISD-72x deflector shield generator dome]], which were seen on many Imperial ships. Deflection towers took up much more room than deflector shield generator domes, which were mainly designed to protect [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]]. This extra room allowed for more powerful shields with much more range than standard shielding technology.

==History==
Many such structures were found on [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] such as the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Stars]]. They were often guarded by [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser turrets]].
